expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with multiple user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Notification Center",
  "branchName": "notification-center",
  "description": "Users need a notification center where they can see unread badges, open a notification list, mark notifications read or unread, filter by read state, and clear all read notifications. Store read state so it persists across sessions.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add schema for notification read state",
      "description": "As a developer, I want a schema to store notification read state so it persists across sessions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Database schema includes read state for notifications",
        "Default is unread",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add backend actions for read state updates",
      "description": "As a developer, I want backend actions to mark notifications as read, unread, and clear all read notifications.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend action to mark notification as read",
        "Backend action to mark notification as unread",
        "Backend action to clear all read notifications",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add notification unread badge UI",
      "description": "As a user, I want to see a badge indicating unread notifications.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Badge shows number of unread notifications",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add notification list UI",
      "description": "As a user, I want to open a notification list to see my notifications.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification list UI displays notifications",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add read/unread toggle controls in notification list",
      "description": "As a user, I want to mark notifications as read or unread from the list.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "UI controls to toggle read/unread state",
        "Action updates backend and UI",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Add filter for read state in notification list",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter my notifications by read state.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Filter UI allows selecting read or unread",
        "List updates to show matching notifications",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-007",
      "title": "Add clear all read notifications button",
      "description": "As a user, I want a button to clear all my read notifications.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Button to clear read notifications is visible",
        "Clicking triggers the backend clear action and updates list",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 7,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover persistence, badge or list UI, read-state updates, filtering, and clearing read notifications.
